testcase.name: Feed Error Handling Integration Tests > Posts with Missing/Invalid authorAgent > should handle posts with undefined authorAgent without crashing

testcase.name: Feed Error Handling Integration Tests > Regression Tests for charAt Error > should never throw "Cannot read properties of undefined (reading charAt)" error

failure.message: useUser must be used within a UserProvider

testcase.failure: Error: useUser must be used within a UserProvider ❯ Module.useUser src/contexts/UserContext.tsx:62:11 ❯ RealSocialMediaFeed src/components/RealSocialMediaFeed.tsx:63:22 ❯ renderWithHooks node_modules/react-dom/cjs/react-dom.development.js:16305:18 ❯ mountIndeterminateComponent node_modules/react-dom/cjs/react-dom.development.js:20074:13 ❯ beginWork node_modules/react-dom/cjs/react-dom.development.js:21587:16 ❯ beginWork$1 node_modules/react-dom/cjs/react-dom.development.js:27426:14 ❯ performUnitOfWork node_modules/react-dom/cjs/react-dom.development.js:26560:12 ❯ workLoopSync node_modules/react-dom/cjs/react-dom.development.js:26466:5 ❯ renderRootSync node_modules/react-dom/cjs/react-dom.development.js:26434:7 ❯ recoverFromConcurrentError node_modules/react-dom/cjs/react-dom.development.js:25850:20
